title: Results of carbapenemases determination
author: Pruss, Agata
license_note: Zenodo record metadata license field: cc-by-4.0
description: The production of carbapenemases was assessed using phenotypic and genetic methods. T he phenotypic determination of   ca  r  bapenemases   was performed using the disk-diffusion method  .   DDST  -  EDTA (double-disk   synergy   test) for   MBL,   CDT(  combined disc test) for KPC  ,   and   TEMfor   OXA-48 were performed. The other phenotypic method were   NG-TEST CARBA 5 assay, CIM test, the  Carba  tube assay, the RAPIDEC CARBA NP assay and the  Carba's  CHROM ID medium. The PCR was used as a genetic method.
steps_raw: The production of carbapenemases was assessed using phenotypic and genetic methods. DDST  -  EDTA (double-disk   synergy   test) for   MBL,   CDT(  combined disc test) for KPC  ,   and   TEMfor   OXA-48 were performed. The other phenotypic method were   NG-TEST CARBA 5 assay, CIM test, the  Carba  tube assay, the RAPIDEC CARBA NP assay and the  Carba's  CHROM ID medium. The PCR was used as a genetic method.
